name: Scrambled Eggs Benedict
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, mix the Hollandaise Sauce Mix with 1/4 cup of water according to package instructions. Make sure the sauce packet weighs approximately 1 1/4 ounces.
2. Split the English muffins in half.
3. Cook the Canadian bacon until crispy.
4. Crack the eggs into a separate bowl and whisk them with milk until combined.
5. Season the egg mixture with salt.
6. Place the cooked Canadian bacon on each split English muffin.
7. Add the chopped green peppers, if using.
8. Pour the prepared Hollandaise sauce over the bacon and pepper(s).
9. Top each muffin half with the whisked eggs.
10. Cook until the eggs are set to your desired level of doneness.
11. Turn off the heat when finished.
